description_long: This shotgun features a long, metallic barrel with a slightly weathered finish, attached to a robust receiver that houses a visible cylindrical component on one side. The stock is a skeletal, metallic frame with a brown grip and butt, providing a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. The foregrip area includes a set of blue cylindrical shells or cartridges, suggesting a tactical or modern design. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, with a pronounced finger groove for ergonomic handling. The overall construction combines metal and polymer elements, with exposed mechanical parts and a utilitarian, industrial aesthetic. The shotgun's design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A long-barreled, metallic shotgun with a skeletal stock, blue shell holders, and a robust, industrial design. Features a rounded trigger guard and exposed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, blue shell holders, and the skeletal stock with brown grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cylindrical component on the receiver and the overall length of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletal stock and grip, with the barrel receding into the distance.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a pronounced finger groove
